stories: Good morning Sean, it's Tuesday, the twelfth of May, 2026
Fun fact: an average cumulus cloud weighs around a million tonnes
Just an everyday puffball, not a thunderhead
It floats because it's slightly less dense than the surrounding air, but the mass is genuinely there
Two Neighbourhood Police Centres in Serangoon and Hougang merge in July, while a new Cyber Command consolidates the force's cybercrime and anti-scam operations
Also, two Singapore residents are in isolation at the NCID after exposure to Andes hantavirus aboard the cruise ship M/V Hondius
The EU has now issued guidance on the same outbreak
On geopolitics: Wednesday's Trump and Xi summit in Beijing is the dominant story
Good morning Sean, it's Tuesday, the twelfth of May, 2026
Fun fact: an average cumulus cloud weighs around a million tonnes
Just an everyday puffball, not a thunderhead
It floats because it's slightly less dense than the surrounding air, but the mass is genuinely there
Two Neighbourhood Police Centres in Serangoon and Hougang merge in July, while a new Cyber Command consolidates the force's cybercrime and anti-scam operations
Also, two Singapore residents are in isolation at the NCID after exposure to Andes hantavirus aboard the cruise ship M/V Hondius
The EU has now issued guidance on the same outbreak
On geopolitics: Wednesday's Trump and Xi summit in Beijing is the dominant story
Good evening Sean, it's Monday evening, the eleventh of May, 2026
Fun fact: in Germany and central Europe, May eleventh through thirteenth are known as the Eisheiligen - the Ice Saints
German gardeners still wait until after the fifteenth before planting frost-sensitive crops outside
It starts early - the T400 Briefing on FY2027 Annual Improvement Priorities is at seven in the morning
From nine you're into ERP Strategic Roadmap sessions, with the Meridian Risk Workshop at nine-thirty
The anchor meeting is L4 EAS MOP and MIP from ten until eleven-thirty, followed by weekly integrations with PwC
The afternoon has L5 prep from two, the Growth AIP feedback session at three, and the Zain revision closing things out at four
On tourism, the STB released its 2026 outlook: arrivals are forecast at seventeen to eighteen million, though spending per visitor is expected to soften as global uncertainty bites
